{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# The Feed-Forward Block {#sec-mlp-activations}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- The other half of a transformer block: the position-wise MLP, where
     much of the model's capacity (and parameters) live. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Position-wise MLPs

<!-- Up-projection, nonlinearity, down-projection; applied independently per
     position. The 4x expansion convention and its parameter cost. -->

## Activation functions

<!-- ReLU -> GELU -> gated variants (GLU/SwiGLU). Why gating helps; the
     compute/quality trade-off. -->

## What the MLP computes

<!-- A gesture at the "key-value memory" / feature interpretation, kept
     honest about how much we actually know. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
